'''Aga''' were large, [[Sentience/Legends|semi-sentient]] beings with six [[Limb/Legends|legs]] hailing from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zelos II]]. Aga were pack creatures, and they would attack other creatures not only for food but also for the sheer enjoyment of the fight. They were known to use simple tools such as clubs, which showed their potential to become an advanced species.<ref name="POG2" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] was known to have drugged them and used them as guards.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|14|Aga}}</ref>
